summary: Frontend testing of LeadFinder glassmorphism redesign and Calculator Smart Upgrade Tip feature. All tests passed. LeadFinder shows proper glassmorphism styling on login screen and all 5 tabs work correctly. Calculator Smart Upgrade Tip correctly shows savings banner when upgrading is cheaper, and correctly hides when upgrade is more expensive or already at highest tier.

critical_code_review_comments: LeadFinder glassmorphism correctly implemented with bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/[0.04] backdrop-blur-xl
LeadFinder all 5 tabs (ZOEKEN, CSV, LEADS, STATS, TOOLS) accessible and functional
Calculator getUpgradeTip() function correctly calculates when upgrade is cheaper
Calculator handlePackageChange() correctly resets excluded add-ons when switching packages
Smart Upgrade Tip correctly shows green banner with savings amount and upgrade button
Smart Upgrade Tip correctly hides when: 1) upgrade is more expensive, 2) already at highest tier (Premium)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 35: Tested LeadFinder glassmorphism redesign and Calculator Smart Upgrade Tip. Key findings: 1) LeadFinder login screen has glassmorphism card with backdrop-blur-xl and semi-transparent bg-white/60, 2) LeadFinder has 5 tabs: ZOEKEN (search with Branche/Locatie inputs), CSV (import button + 4 stat cards), LEADS (filter dropdowns + database), STATS (status counts dashboard), TOOLS (tool cards grid), 3) Calculator has 4 packages: Rebranding €249, Basic €399, Pro €699, Premium €999, 4) Smart Upgrade Tip appears when Pro + multiLanguage + bookingSystem selected (€1097 > Premium €999, saves €98), 5) Clicking upgrade button switches to Premium, resets add-ons, tip disappears, total shows €999, 6) No tip appears for Basic + darkMode (€478 < Pro €699), 7) No tip appears for Premium (already highest tier). Key data-testids: package-rebranding, package-basic, package-pro, package-premium, addon-multiLanguage, addon-bookingSystem, addon-darkMode, upgrade-tip-banner, upgrade-tip-button, total-onetime, calculator-page.
